# Psalms 29

## Verses (11)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Give to the Lord, you sons of the gods, give to the Lord glory and strength. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Give to the Lord the full glory of his name; give him worship in holy robes. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | The voice of the Lord is on the waters: the God of glory is thundering, the Lord is on the great waters. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | The voice of the Lord is full of power; the voice of the Lord has a noble sound. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | By the voice of the Lord are the cedar-trees broken, even the cedars of Lebanon are broken by the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | He makes them go jumping about like a young ox; Lebanon and Sirion like a young mountain ox. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | At the voice of the Lord flames of fire are seen. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | At the voice of the Lord there is a shaking in the waste land, even a shaking in the waste land of Kadesh. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | At the voice of the Lord the roes give birth, the leaves are taken from the trees: in his Temple everything says, Glory. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | The Lord had his seat as king when the waters came on the earth; the Lord is seated as king for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | The Lord will give strength to his people; the Lord will give his people the blessing of peace. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
